description: Committed LIVE conversion/source/dispatch admission adapter (runtime-composition-provenance correction): obtains identities from the installed runtime (no caller-supplied observed fields), binds import-origin/distribution-root/source-bytes/class-modules, and verifies the live dispatch object exactly. Blocks honestly on the expected-digest independence gate. Aggregate-only.

installed_bindings.live_finding: the converter/operation CLASSES (PrefixChange/WeightConverter/MergeModulelist/Concatenate) are defined in transformers.core_model_loading, not conversion_mapping -- surfaced by the live adapter and now pinned + class-module-bound

dispatch_verifier_hardening: exact total object count + exactly-one prefix change enforced (defects 2/3), so no extra/unrecognized converter can coexist with a valid-looking pair

independence_gate_blocked.blocker: expected source digests not yet derived from the immutable PyPI upstream artifact for transformers 5.13.1; deriving from installed bytes is self-binding
independence_gate_blocked.upstream_resolvable: transformers 5.13.1 exists on PyPI (normal install, no direct_url) -> independent upstream derivation is feasible as the next step

remaining.independence: derive expected digests from the immutable PyPI 5.13.1 sdist/wheel and bind; add the 10 adversarial integration tests (forged bundle, self-bound digests, shadow path, same-version different wheel, shadow class, extra converter, non-live extraction, wrong loader entry)
remaining.gptq_runtime_tuple: freeze+install exact immutable Optimum/GPTQModel+Defuser/BACKEND.GPTQ_TORCH tuple (moving main not admissible) -- operator decision
remaining.then: synthetic differentiable fixture; Phase-0 conjunction; weights; authorized GPU transition; exact forward + activation VJP/JVP parity; lens fit

privacy: aggregate-only; version + booleans + public source-digest prefixes, no host paths/private digests, tensor values, weights, caches
